name: Candy-Stick Logs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Place popcorn in a large, deep buttered baking pan and keep warm in the oven.
3. Combine sugar, water, corn syrup, vinegar, and salt in a large saucepan.
4. Cook until the mixture reaches 250°F on a candy thermometer.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
6. Remove popcorn from the oven.
7. Pour the syrup mixture over the popcorn, stirring to mix well.
8. Shape 1 cup of popcorn around each candy stick to form a log.
